placeholders.managedOrganizationId: ID of the organization managed from the Fiskaly dashboard

reset.title: Reset Fiskaly
reset.message: This will delete all Fiskaly settings and client data for this organization. This action cannot be undone.

permanentlyDisabled.title: Fiskaly has been permanently disabled
permanentlyDisabled.message: The TSS of this organization has been permanently set to DISABLED in Fiskaly. This is irreversible and cannot be reactivated. To use Fiskaly again, you must create a new TSS (rotate/recommission).

rotate.title: Rotate Fiskaly
rotate.message: This will create a new Fiskaly TSS and requires re-provisioning of POS devices. Existing fiscal history will be preserved.

decommission.title: Decommission Fiskaly
decommission.message: This will attempt to disable the TSS in Fiskaly and revoke credentials. If API deactivation is not supported, you must manually disable the TSS in the Fiskaly dashboard. Historical fiscal data will be preserved.
decommission.manual: TSS must be manually disabled in the Fiskaly dashboard

recommission.title: Recommission Fiskaly
recommission.message: This will reactivate the TSS and generate new API credentials. You may need to update the credentials in your Fiskaly dashboard if API reactivation is not supported.

toggle.title: Disable Fiskaly
toggle.message: Choose how you want to disable Fiskaly. You can pause it locally (reversible) or permanently disable the TSS in Fiskaly (irreversible).

verify.credentialsMissing: API credentials are missing. Save the Fiskaly settings first.
verify.credentialsInvalid: API credentials are invalid or revoked.
verify.notConfigured: Fiskaly TSS not configured. Save the settings first.

scheduledOrderTimeSlotInterval.description: How many minutes between available time slots for scheduled orders

scheduledOrderMaxOrdersPerSlot.label: Max scheduled orders per time slot
scheduledOrderMaxOrdersPerSlot.description: Maximum number of scheduled orders allowed in a single time slot. Leave empty for unlimited.

futureOrders.title: Future Order Scheduling
futureOrders.description: Allow customers to schedule orders for future dates
futureOrders.enabledDescription: Master switch to enable or disable all scheduled orders
futureOrders.enablePickupDescription: Allow customers to schedule pickup orders for future dates
futureOrders.enableDeliveryDescription: Allow customers to schedule delivery orders for future dates
futureOrders.maxDaysDescription: Number of days in advance customers can schedule orders (0 = today only)

scheduledOrderMerge.title: Scheduled Order Merge
scheduledOrderMerge.description: Configure whether customers can merge scheduled orders
scheduledOrderMerge.enableDescription: Allow customers to merge orders that are scheduled for the same time slot
scheduledOrderMerge.cutoffHoursDescription: How many hours before the scheduled time merging is still allowed (1-48)

scheduledOrderManagement.title: Scheduled Order Management
scheduledOrderManagement.description: Configure cancellation, modification, and refund policies for scheduled orders

cancellation.enableDescription: Allow customers to cancel scheduled orders

modification.enableDescription: Allow customers to modify scheduled orders
modification.shallowEnableDescription: Allow customers to change only the scheduled date/time without cancelling and re-ordering

autoConfirm.label: Auto-confirm scheduled orders
autoConfirm.description: If disabled, scheduled orders will start as pending and require admin confirmation

minimumAmount.label: Minimum order amount
minimumAmount.description: Set a minimum order amount for scheduled orders (0 = no minimum). Does not apply when merging orders.

deliverySettings.title: Delivery Settings
deliverySettings.description: Configure delivery radius, timing, and thresholds
deliverySettings.useDynamicDeliveryFee: Use dynamic delivery fee (calculate from distance)
deliverySettings.useDynamicDeliveryFeeDescription: If enabled, delivery fee = distance × rate per km. If disabled, uses the fixed delivery fee.
deliverySettings.useTieredDeliveryFee: Use tiered delivery fee (fixed price for initial range, then per km rates)
deliverySettings.useTieredDeliveryFeeDescription: Fixed price for initial distance range, then standard rate per km, then extended rate per km for longer distances.
deliverySettings.initialDeliveryRangeDescription: Distance in km for the initial fixed price (e.g., 0-3 km)
deliverySettings.initialDeliveryPriceDescription: Fixed price for distances up to initial range
deliverySettings.extendedDeliveryThresholdDescription: Distance where extended rate kicks in (e.g., 10 km)
deliverySettings.extendedDeliveryRateDescription: Rate per km for distances beyond extended threshold
deliverySettings.howItWorksDescription: For distances ≤ initial range, charge the fixed initial price. For distances between initial range and extended threshold, charge standard rate per km (configured above). For distances beyond extended threshold (if set), charge extended rate per km.

deliveryPaymentSettings.title: Delivery Payment Settings
deliveryPaymentSettings.description: Configure payment methods available for delivery orders

pickupPaymentSettings.title: Pickup Payment Settings
pickupPaymentSettings.description: Configure which payment methods are accepted for pickup orders

socialMedia.title: Social Media & Contact
socialMedia.description: Add your social media links and website

servingHours.title: Delivery Serving Hours
servingHours.description: Set the hours when you accept delivery orders for each day
servingHours.allowOrdersOutsideHoursDescription: If enabled, users can place orders outside serving hours. Orders will be served when serving hours start.

appStatus.title: Application Status
appStatus.description: Control what visitors see when the storefront is paused or not yet live.
appStatus.label: Current status

pushNotifications.title: Push Notifications
pushNotifications.description: Configure push notification settings for web users

pushNotifications.enableNotifications: Click below to enable push notifications
pushNotifications.permissionDenied: Permission denied. Please enable notifications in your browser settings.
pushNotifications.updateError: Failed to update push notification settings

systemSettings.title: System Settings
systemSettings.description: Enable or disable the reservation system

operatingHours.title: Operating Hours
operatingHours.description: Set your restaurant operating hours for each day

bookingRules.title: Booking Rules
bookingRules.description: Configure reservation booking rules and constraints
bookingRules.timeSlotIntervalDescription: Customers can book at intervals of this duration. Smaller intervals provide more booking options.
bookingRules.minAdvanceBookingDescription: Minimum hours customers must book in advance
bookingRules.modificationWindowDescription: Hours before reservation when customers can modify (e.g., 24 = can modify up to 24 hours before)
bookingRules.allowSameDayBookingDescription: Allow customers to book on the same day

preOrderSettings.title: Pre-Order Settings
preOrderSettings.enablePreOrderDescription: Allow customers to pre-order meals with reservations
preOrderSettings.depositPercentageDescription: Percentage of total order amount required as upfront payment (0-100%). Remaining balance will be collected later.
preOrderSettings.allowedPaymentMethodsDescription: Select which payment methods customers can use for reservation deposits

advancedSettings.title: Advanced Settings
advancedSettings.maxCapacityDescription: Maximum total guests allowed per time slot
advancedSettings.bufferTimeDescription: Time buffer between reservations for table preparation

excludedDates.title: Excluded Dates
excludedDates.description: Define dates or date ranges when reservations will not be accepted

pushNotifications.title: Push Notifications
pushNotifications.description: Send notifications to all subscribed users

pushNotifications.descriptionOrganization: Send notifications to your organization's subscribers
